scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,worker,client -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev:worker --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace client
